summary: The user expressed a strong interest in Korean cuisine, particularly in making Bibimbap and Japchae at home. They sought recipes and tips for recreating restaurant-style kimchi and exploring Korean-Indian fusion dishes, ultimately focusing on incorporating Indian spices into their Japchae recipe.
facts: The user has been ordering takeout from a new Korean restaurant downtown three times this month, each time getting Bibimbap with extra kimchi. The user is taking an online cooking class focused on Indian cuisine and has learned to make Chicken Tikka Masala and a garam masala blend from scratch. The user has been experimenting with making Japchae at home and believes they have perfected the recipe. The user plans to add garam masala to their Japchae noodles while cooking. The user is curious about tempering oil with cumin seeds and mustard seeds for their Japchae. The user is interested in incorporating turmeric and coriander into their Japchae sauce.
